commands.label: formation
commands.description: Switch bots to a preset formation

commands.label: formationchange
commands.description: How bots transition to new formations

commands.label: rotatemode
commands.description: Whether bots rotate around a pivot or stay anchored

commands.label: orbx
commands.description: Orbit speed around X axis (rotates Y and Z — tilts forward/back)

commands.label: orby
commands.description: Orbit speed around Y axis (spins formation horizontally)

commands.label: orbz
commands.description: Orbit speed around Z axis (rolls formation side to side)

commands.label: dynspeed
commands.description: Speed for dynamic animated formations

commands.label: ropespeed
commands.description: Speed of the rope swing animation

commands.label: breathespeed
commands.description: Speed of the breathe pulse animation

commands.label: breatheintensity
commands.description: How much bots expand/contract while breathing

commands.label: arch
commands.description: Vertical arch height for applicable formations

commands.label: offset
commands.description: Spacing multiplier between bots in formation

commands.label: transformduration
commands.description: Seconds to complete a transform transition

commands.label: rotatex
commands.description: Tilt formation on the X axis (degrees)

commands.label: rotatey
commands.description: Spin formation on the Y axis (degrees)

commands.label: rotatez
commands.description: Roll formation on the Z axis (degrees)

commands.label: setformationoffset
commands.description: Set a fixed XYZ offset for the formation center

commands.label: moveformation
commands.description: Shift the formation by XYZ relative to its current position

commands.label: rotateformation
commands.description: Permanently rotate the formation shape by XYZ degrees

commands.label: setrotation
commands.description: Override each bot's character rotation to XYZ

commands.label: breathing mode
commands.description: Pulsing expand/contract animation on the formation

commands.label: auto formation
commands.description: Bots auto-pick formation based on bot count

commands.label: resets
commands.description: Clear formation position, rotation, or tetris state

commands.label: follow
commands.description: Make bots follow a specific player by username

commands.label: followmode
commands.description: How bots move relative to the leader

commands.label: dragreturn
commands.description: How bots return to start after finishing a drag race

commands.label: dragspawn
commands.description: How bots are positioned at the drag race start line

commands.label: dragspread
commands.description: Side-by-side spacing between bots at start (used by lanes mode)

commands.label: dragwidth
commands.description: Track width scale for the drag race course

commands.label: dragreturnspeed
commands.description: Speed bots travel when returning to the start line

commands.label: dragflyheight
commands.description: How high bots fly when using the fly return mode

commands.label: dragsink
commands.description: Depth bots sink underground in the underground return mode

commands.label: dragrise
commands.description: How high bots surface when exiting underground return

commands.label: dragstartdist
commands.description: Distance from leader where the race start line is placed

commands.label: dragenddist
commands.description: Total track length (distance from start to finish line)

commands.label: dragspeed
commands.description: Min/max walk speed range for bots during a drag race

commands.label: hold
commands.description: Hold bots near a target player for a set duration

commands.label: cancelhold
commands.description: Release bots from a hold (optionally specify target)

commands.label: dragvisuals
commands.description: Show/hide the visual track markers for drag races

commands.label: drag lines
commands.description: Draw lines from each bot to the finish line

commands.label: detach / attach
commands.description: Detach bots from the leader (freeze in place) or reattach

commands.label: resets
commands.description: Reset race score counters or drag state

commands.label: actions
commands.description: Teleport bots to leader, or stop all movement

commands.label: look
commands.description: Set where bots' cameras are pointed

commands.label: scroll
commands.description: Scroll bots' cameras in or out by a number of steps

commands.label: preview
commands.description: Show a ghost preview of a formation without switching to it

commands.label: leader rotation
commands.description: Whether bots rotate with the leader or stay fixed; toggle switches between modes

commands.label: mouse lock
commands.description: Lock bots into first-person mouse lock mode, or unlock

commands.label: chat
commands.description: Send a chat message from all bots simultaneously

commands.label: chatorder
commands.description: Each bot chats a word in sequence to spell out a message

commands.label: chatorderreverse
commands.description: Same as chatorder but bots speak in reverse index order

commands.label: pressorder
commands.description: Each bot presses a key in sequence

commands.label: press
commands.description: Make all bots press a keyboard key (e.g. e, f, space)

commands.label: use
commands.description: Activate a hotbar tool by slot number

commands.label: shellgamespeed
commands.description: Global speed multiplier for the shell game animation

commands.label: spamclick
commands.description: Continuously spam left-click at the mouse position

commands.label: click
commands.description: Perform a single mouse click with the chosen button

commands.label: movemouse
commands.description: Move bots' cursor to a screen XY position

commands.label: shellgame
commands.description: Start a shell game with N shuffles at a given speed

commands.label: givebot
commands.description: Transfer N bots to another user's panel session

commands.label: changeindex
commands.description: Swap positions of two bots by their slot index

commands.label: hide / unhide
commands.description: Make bots invisible or visible to all players

commands.label: utilities
commands.description: gc: free memory · disable: stop script · worm: navigate to leader's path

commands.label: makeadmin
commands.description: Grant a player admin access to control bots

commands.label: removeadmin
commands.description: Revoke a player's admin access

commands.label: phantomfleet
commands.description: Auto-relaunch disconnected bots to keep the count full

commands.label: quit
commands.description: Disconnect and close all bots immediately

commands.label: info commands
commands.description: Print a list of active items in the bot chat
